name: Peach Fizz
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart pitcher, prepare the limeade concentrate as directed on the label.
Measure 1 cup of reconstituted limeade into a 1-quart saucepan; heat over high heat until boiling.
Remove the saucepan from heat. Stir the peach flavor gelatin into the hot limeade, stirring until the gelatin is completely dissolved. Stir the mixture into the limeade in the pitcher.
2. Place half of the peaches and their syrup in a blender; blend at high speed until pureed. Repeat with the remaining peaches and syrup. Stir the puree and lime juice into the limeade mixture. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour or until well chilled.
3. To serve, stir the tonic water into the limeade mixture. Garnish with lime slices.
